content:
💡 OpenGait | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Developing and evaluating novel gait recognition models.
✨ Key Features: • Flexible and extensible framework • Supports designing and comparing custom gait recognition models • Facilitates comparison with state-of-the-art methods • Includes tutorials for datasets like GaitLU-1M and SUSTech1K • Active development with recent publications and model releases (e.g., BiggerGait, LidarGait++, DenoisingGait)
📖 Summary: OpenGait is a Python-based framework designed for flexible and extensible gait recognition. It allows researchers to easily design and compare their own models against state-of-the-art methods, facilitating advancements in human identification through walking patterns.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
